name: Honmyue Enterprise Co., Ltd.
summary: Honmyue Enterprise Co., Ltd. operates as a fabric and textile manufacturer in Taiwan. The company offers a range of products, such as fabric/textile materials, including nylon fabrics, polyester fabrics, olefin fabrics, olefin polypropylene fabrics, polyester spun fabrics, vinyl mesh fabrics, textilene fabrics, TC/TR fabrics, yarn dyed fabrics, solution dyed fabrics, etc. It also provides isolation and surgical gowns, surgical drapes, medical scrubs, bedsheets, fitted sheets, pillowcases, body bags, tent fabrics, and masks, as well as other personal protect equipment. The company's products are used in industrial and baggage fabric, outdoor and indoor furnishing fabric, sports apparel fabric, and medical textile applications. Honmyue Enterprise Co., Ltd. was founded in 1970 and is based in Changhua County, Taiwan.
